title: THATS WHY THEYRE THE GOATS
author: Marcelo
message: I am gonna keep it a stack here mentors, before I came to the events I was friendless, chopped and kind of lost in my classes but these events fixed the friendless part of my university year (also the lost part). There was so much effort into these events and it showed, every single one that I went to was a banger 10000/10. You created such a unique and welcoming environment that I had no fear being myself with everyone, which has led me to making friendships that will last me for the rest of uni. Thank you so much!
